items.title: Multivariate Distributional Reinforcement Learning Using Sliced Divergences
items.abstract: Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) models the full return distribution rather than expectations, but extending it to multivariate settings remains challenging. Many common metrics do not naturally generalize beyond one dimension or lose computational tractability, and the multivariate case introduces additional difficulties such as general matrix discounting, for which no contraction results are available. We introduce Sliced Distributional Reinforcement Learning (SDRL), which lifts tractable one-dimensional divergences to multivariate return distributions via projections. We prove Bellman contraction for uniform slicing under shared scalar discounting, and introduce a maximum-slicing variant with contraction under general dense discount matrices. SDRL supports a broad class of base divergences; we analyze Wasserstein, Cramér, and Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), and characterize which SDRL variants suit the standard single-sample Bellman update used in distributional RL. We evaluate SDRL on a toy chain problem and a gridworld image-based environment as well as a subset of Atari games.
items.llm_evidence_en: distributional reinforcement learning algorithm for multivariate returns
items.llm_evidence_cn: 多元回报分布强化学习算法
items.llm_evidence: 多元回报分布强化学习算法
items.canonical_evidence: 多元回报分布强化学习算法
items.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Sliced Distributional Reinforcement Learning (SDRL) that lifts 1D divergences to multivariate return distributions via projections, proving Bellman contraction for uniform slicing.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 现有分布强化学习在多变量场景中面临度量泛化困难和计算复杂性问题。本文提出切片分布强化学习（SDRL），通过投影将一维散度推广到多元回报分布，并证明了均匀切片下的贝尔曼收缩。最大切片变体在一般密集折扣下也能保证收缩。该方法为多元分布强化学习提供了可扩展的理论框架和实用算法。
items.llm_tldr: 现有分布强化学习在多变量场景中面临度量泛化困难和计算复杂性问题。本文提出切片分布强化学习（SDRL），通过投影将一维散度推广到多元回报分布，并证明了均匀切片下的贝尔曼收缩。最大切片变体在一般密集折扣下也能保证收缩。该方法为多元分布强化学习提供了可扩展的理论框架和实用算法。
